sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 5.5 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.5)

statement.latex: If$G$is a finitely generated abelian-by-polycyclic-by-finite group, does there exist a finitely generated metabelian group$M$such that$G$is isomorphic to a subgroup of the automorphism group of$M$? If so, many of the tricky properties of$G$like its residual finiteness would become transparent.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
